```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Implement API documentation with interactive examples"
---
# API Interactive Docs
## Task
Create interactive API documentation with try-it-now functionality.
## Requirements
1. Auto-generate docs from OpenAPI spec. 2. Include interactive request builder.
3. Show request/response examples for each endpoint. 4. Document authentication setup.
5. Support code snippet generation (curl, Python, JS).
## Constraints
- Keep docs in sync with API. Use Swagger UI or Redoc. Include all error codes.
## Success Criteria
- Docs fully interactive. Examples work. Code snippets correct. Auth documented.
```
